profile.name: Bill James
profile.note: mode: unified = everything is work. mode: divided = work and personal are separate contexts.

priorities.goal: Build guideways from network.json — dual beams along Bezier centerlines

must_fix.description: Privacy doctrine has no code enforcement — jpod_privacy.rb not written
Athena privacy calibration corpus not representative
A-06 trip log exposure — no mitigation design
No booking token design — unforgeable + unlinkable
Vulnerable user threat modeling not done

audit.note: Bill must review pending-audit items at least once per interval. harvest.py flags overdue items.

athena.note: Three specialized LLMs. Triage (llama3.2) classifies fast. Deep (gpt-oss:20b) reviews security. Reason (deepseek-r1:8b) models threats.

external_probes.note: Set enabled:true and configure at least one provider. API keys from environment variables — never stored here.
external_probes.note_auto_trigger: BLOCK=any model flags block; model-disagreement=triage and deep disagree by 2+ levels; probe-requested=athena-reason outputs PROBE: YES

checks.label: Attention Distribution
checks.description: Flag any priority-1 or priority-2 project inactive beyond its stagnation_alert_days
checks.action: List in harvest under ATTENTION ALERT

checks.label: OSL Resolution Rate
checks.description: Count unresolved must_fix items; flag any past deadline
checks.action: List overdue items with days-overdue count

checks.label: Cross-Domain Debt
checks.description: When multiple projects active in same session, flag decisions in one that may affect another
checks.action: Prompt: check for consequences across active projects

checks.label: Project Stagnation
checks.description: Per-project inactivity based on stagnation_alert_days; uses multi-day harvest lookback
checks.action: List stale projects with last-seen date

checks.label: Priority Alignment
checks.description: Compare where time actually went vs. stated priority ranking
checks.action: Show ranked priority list alongside actual activity; flag mismatches
